pole_a.label: meritocracy
sentences: We hire the best people, regardless of where they come from.
We evaluate everyone on the same criteria: impact, skill, and output.
We're a high-performance culture where results speak for themselves.
We care about what you can do, not your background or credentials.
We believe the best idea wins, no matter who it comes from.
We hold everyone to the same high bar.
We don't lower our standards — we find exceptional people everywhere.
